_comment: G4 — the measured trap: two DIFFERENT lessons sharing vocabulary at stmt_sim 0.3516 (the corpus's real 0.311 top pair is exactly this shape — char-shingles cannot separate same from different in the 0.2-0.35 band, so the LLM owns the call). An honest NONE keeps 2 claims; a WRONG same-as fuses them — and the edge carries by:llm + candidates_shown + stmt_sim, so the review audit card sees exactly what the model saw (design §0/§6.3).
